remaining_blockers: No functional #623 blocker remains from the product OAuth live path. The committed manifest is code-commit-bound to cfcc7143968171c376eddaec787ff7aea95f376f; a CI/external artifact may additionally run check_evidence.py --require-head after the final evidence commit if strict HEAD equality is required.

head_binding.reason: The tracked manifest/artifacts bind to the code commit that was built, installed, and exercised on-device. A tracked file cannot contain the hash of a later commit that also changes that same file, so --require-head is reserved for CI/external regenerated evidence.

local_client_header_drift.live_acceptance: Both product providers were accepted by their live backends using local credentials seeded into the encrypted CredentialStore path; this is live runtime acceptance of the in-repo header/body recipe, not raw installed-client header extraction.

device_app_oauth_flow.summary: Pixel 8 Pro debug APK opened Claude OAuth from the Assistant setup UI and Codex OAuth from the Assistant model picker. Claude completed through the manual code flow; Codex completed through the localhost:1455 loopback callback. The app wrote two app-private encrypted provider credentials, and subsequent mobile WebView agent turns produced real Claude and Codex tool_call events plus StoreArchive tool_result events and done.reason=complete.

live_harness.seed_source: explicit environment variables persisted through the same encrypted app-host CredentialStore load path used by product OAuth
must_observe: StoreArchive tool_result from seeded fixture m-live
usage.provider and usage.model in agent status
live_harness.claude_live_command: Python harness read local Claude OAuth JSON without printing values, set ISY623_CLAUDE_OAUTH_ACCESS/REFRESH and ISY623_LIVE_TRACE_DIR in the child environment, then ran cargo +1.95.0 test -p isyncyou-app-host --features agent-oauth-providers live_claude_oauth_storearchive_tool_roundtrip -- --ignored --nocapture
live_harness.claude_trace_result: pass: trace shows tool_call search, tool_result containing m-live and fixture sentinel, tool_call read m-live, second positive tool_result, done.reason=complete
live_harness.codex_live_command: Python harness read local Codex auth JSON without printing values, set ISY623_CODEX_OAUTH_ACCESS/REFRESH/ACCOUNT_ID and ISY623_LIVE_TRACE_DIR in the child environment, then ran cargo +1.95.0 test -p isyncyou-app-host --features agent-oauth-providers live_codex_oauth_storearchive_tool_roundtrip -- --ignored --nocapture
live_harness.codex_trace_result: pass: trace shows tool_call search, tool_result containing m-live and fixture sentinel, tool_call read m-live, second positive tool_result, done.reason=complete
live_harness.workspace_test_observation: cargo +1.95.0 test --workspace --no-fail-fast previously passed; after the live-gate fixture fix, the two product OAuth live gates passed when explicitly run with local credentials seeded into the child process.

live_gates_passed.seed: local Claude OAuth credential copied into child-process ISY623_* env only
local Codex OAuth credential copied into child-process ISY623_* env only
user completed the Claude OAuth flow from the Android Assistant UI; provider credential persisted in the app-private encrypted CredentialStore
user completed the Codex OAuth flow from the Android Assistant UI/model picker; provider credential persisted in the app-private encrypted CredentialStore
